title: Photoconductive element, method for manufacturing the same, and measuring apparatus
abstract: A photoconductive element, including: a photoconductive layer; and a plurality of conductive units disposed on the photoconductive layer, each of the plurality of conductive units including an electrode; an antenna unit electrically connected with the electrode; and a diffraction grating unit which has a plurality of periodically arranged gratings and which is in contact with the antenna unit, wherein the plurality of conductive units are disposed to face each other with a gap left therebetween between the diffraction grating units of the plurality of conductive units, and wherein a current reflection coefficient in a contact portion of the antenna unit and the diffraction grating unit is Â±5% or less.
claims: Claims ( 14 ) A photoconductive element, comprising: a photoconductive layer; and a plurality of conductive units disposed on the photoconductive layer, each of the plurality of conductive units including an electrode; an antenna unit electrically connected with the electrode; and a diffraction grating unit which has a plurality of periodically arranged gratings and which is in contact with the antenna unit, wherein the plurality of conductive units are disposed to face each other with a gap left therebetween between the diffraction grating units of the plurality of conductive units, and wherein a current reflection coefficient in a contact portion of the antenna unit and the diffraction grating unit is Â±5% or less. A photoconductive element according to claim 1, wherein the current reflection coefficient in the contact portion of the antenna unit and the diffraction grating unit is Â±1% or less. A photoconductive element, comprising: a photoconductive layer; and a plurality of conductive units disposed on the photoconductive layer, each of the plurality of conductive units including an electrode; an antenna unit electrically connected with the electrode; and a diffraction grating unit having a plurality of periodically arranged gratings; and a connecting portion disposed between the antenna unit and the diffraction grating unit and in contact with the diffraction grating unit, wherein the plurality of conductive units are disposed to face each other with a gap left therebetween between the diffraction grating units of the plurality of conductive units, and wherein the current reflection coefficient in the contact portion of the connecting portion and the diffraction grating unit is Â±5% or less. A photoconductive element according to claim 3, wherein the current reflection coefficient in the contact portion of the connecting portion and the diffraction grating unit is Â±1% or less. A photoconductive element according to claim 3 or 4, wherein the antenna unit and the connecting portion are in contact with each other, and the current reflection coefficient in a connecting portion of the antenna unit and the connecting portion is Â±5% or less. A photoconductive element according to claim 5, wherein the current reflection coefficient in the contact portion of the antenna unit and the connecting portion is Â±1% or less. The photoconductive element according to any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein the connecting portion includes a first extending portion which is in contact with some of the plurality of gratings, and has a width larger than the width of each of the plurality of gratings, and a second extending portion which is in contact with the first extending portion, and has a width larger than the width of the first extending portion, and wherein a current reflection coefficient in a contact portion of the second extending portion and the first extending portion is Â±5% or less. The photoconductive element according to any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein the connecting portion has a tapered portion of which width becomes larger toward the antenna unit from the diffraction grating unit. The photoconductive element according to any one of claims 1 to 8, wherein a propagation distance of a photoelectric current propagating between the center of the gap and the electrode is 1.5 mm or longer. The photoconductive element according to any one of claims 1 to 9, wherein a thickness of the diffraction grating unit is the same as that of the antenna unit. The photoconductive element according to any one of claims 1 to 10, wherein the thickness of the diffraction grating unit is 1/3 or less of a wavelength of the light. The photoconductive element according to any one of claims 1 to 11, wherein, if a speed of light is denoted by c, a wavelength of light is denoted by Î», an angular frequency of light is denoted by Ï, an incidence angle of light is denoted by Î¸, a real part of a dielectric constant of the diffraction grating unit in the wavelength of light is denoted by Îµg, a real part of an effectual complex dielectric constant determined by an area and a complex dielectric constant of a substance in contact with the diffraction grating unit is denoted by Îµp, and an arbitrary integer is set to m, an arrangement period L of the plurality of gratings satisfies Expression (1): A measuring apparatus comprising: a generation unit configured to generate a THz wave pulse upon entrance of light; and a detection unit configured to detect a THz wave passed through or reflected off a measurement target, wherein at least one of the generation unit and the detection unit is the photoconductive element according to any one of claims 1 to 12. A method for manufacturing a photoconductive element, comprising: forming a photoconductive layer; forming a first layer, a second layer, and a third layer on the photoconductive layer; etching the second layer using the first layer as a photoresist; removing the first layer; and etching the third layer using the second layer as a photoresist to form an antenna unit and a diffraction grating unit.
